steps.title: Use the zeros
steps.content:
The graph has zeros at $x=7$ and $x=-2$, so the quadratic can be written as
$$
f(x)=a(x-7)(x+2)
$$
where $a$ is an integer greater than $1$.

steps.title: Choose a possible value
steps.content: Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, $-4a$ can be $-8$ when $a=2$. The other choices would not make $a$ an integer greater than $1$. The answer is A.
